languages.text: "Губернатор-полковник передает несколько возможных стратегий. Организовать мобильные отряды с псайкерами, что будут выманивать тварей из логов и истребять их. Либо же приводить тварей на заранее подготовленные позиции для уничтожения их палач-отрядами. Наконец, можно массово уводить тварей в отдаленные безлюдные регионы, собрав экспедицию в великое жертвенное шествие".

traits.locale_text: "Губернатор-полковник передает несколько возможных стратегий. Организовать мобильные отряды с псайкерами, что будут выманивать тварей из логов и истребять их. Либо же приводить тварей на заранее подготовленные позиции для уничтожения их палач-отрядами. Наконец, можно массово уводить тварей в отдаленные безлюдные регионы, собрав экспедицию в великое жертвенное шествие".

languages.text: "The Colonel-Governor proposes several possible strategies, either to organise mobile teams with psykers to lure the creatures from their lairs and exterminate them or to draw the creatures to pre-prepared positions for destruction by executioner squads. Finally, the creatures could be led en masse to remote, uninhabited regions, after assembling an expedition in the form of a great sacrificial procession."

Либо же приводить тварей на заранее подготовленные позиции для уничтожения их палач-отрядами. Наконец, можно массово уводить тварей в отдаленные безлюдные регионы, собрав экспедицию в великое жертвенное шествие".

traits.locale_text: "The Colonel-Governor transmits several possible strategies. Either to organise mobile teams with psykers to lure the creatures from their lairs and exterminate them, or to draw the creatures onto pre-prepared positions for destruction by executioner squads. Finally, the creatures could be led en masse to remote, uninhabited regions, assembling an expedition in the form of a great sacrificial procession."

"The Colonel-Governor proposes several possible strategies, either to organise mobile teams with psykers to lure the creatures from their lairs and exterminate them or to draw the creatures to pre-prepared positions for destruction by executioner squads. Finally, the creatures could be led en masse to remote, uninhabited regions, after assembling an expedition in the form of a great sacrificial procession."

"The Castellan-Governor has sent several possible strategies. Mobile units with psykers that are constantly on the move and thus draw the Drovers away from settlements. Luring them to prepared positions in order to destroy them. And the large-scale luring of the Drovers into remote, deserted regions."

"The Colonel-Governor has sent several possible strategies. Mobile units with psykers that are constantly on the move and thus draw the Drovers away from settlements. Luring them to prepared positions in order to destroy them. And the large-scale luring of the Drovers into remote, deserted regions."

Finally, the creatures could be led en masse to remote, uninhabited regions, assembling an expedition in the form of a great sacrificial procession."

Finally, the creatures could be led en masse to remote, uninhabited regions, after assembling an expedition in the form of a great sacrificial procession."

languages.text: 「城代はいくつかの戦略を提案しています。移動する部隊にサイキック能力者を入れて、移動を繰り返すことで、ドルーバーを村から引き離す。ドルーバーを誘い込み、事前に用意した場所に誘導して、殲滅する。そして、ドルーバーを遠隔の荒れ地へ誘い込む大規模誘導作戦。」
languages.original_text: "The Castellan-Governor has sent several possible strategies. Mobile units with psykers that are constantly on the move and thus draw the Drovers away from settlements. Luring them to prepared positions in order to destroy them. And the large-scale luring of the Drovers into remote, deserted regions."

traits.locale_text: 「城代はいくつかの戦略を提案しています。移動する部隊にサイキック能力者を入れて、移動を繰り返すことで、ドルーバーを村から引き離す。ドルーバーを誘い込み、事前に用意した場所に誘導して、殲滅する。そして、ドルーバーを遠隔の荒れ地へ誘い込む大規模誘導作戦。」

languages.text: «{nc|La coronel-gobernadora|El coronel-gobernador} propone distintas estrategias posibles, desde la organización de unidades móviles con psíquicos a la atracción y exterminio de las criaturas para que abandonen sus guaridas y se sitúen en posiciones designadas para su destrucción mediante escuadrones ejecutores. Por último, es posible atraer a las criaturas en masa a regiones remotas y deshabitadas con una gran procesión sacrificial».
languages.original_text: "The Colonel-Governor proposes several possible strategies, either to organise mobile teams with psykers to lure the creatures from their lairs and exterminate them or to draw the creatures to pre-prepared positions for destruction by executioner squads. Finally, the creatures could be led en masse to remote, uninhabited regions, after assembling an expedition in the form of a great sacrificial procession."

traits.locale_text: «{nc|La coronel-gobernadora|El coronel-gobernador} propone distintas estrategias posibles, desde la organización de unidades móviles con psíquicos a la atracción y exterminio de las criaturas para que abandonen sus guaridas y se sitúen en posiciones designadas para su destrucción mediante escuadrones ejecutores. Por último, es posible atraer a las criaturas en masa a regiones remotas y deshabitadas con una gran procesión sacrificial».

languages.text: “总督上校提交了数套可行战略：一是组建配备灵能者的机动部队，将拒生花引离巢穴后加以消灭；二是将其诱入预设阵地后，由行刑者小队实施清剿。还有一个方案，则是组织一支大型献祭队伍，将这些生物诱导至偏远荒芜的地区。”
languages.original_text: "The Colonel-Governor proposes several possible strategies, either to organise mobile teams with psykers to lure the creatures from their lairs and exterminate them or to draw the creatures to pre-prepared positions for destruction by executioner squads. Finally, the creatures could be led en masse to remote, uninhabited regions, after assembling an expedition in the form of a great sacrificial procession."

traits.locale_text: “总督上校提交了数套可行战略：一是组建配备灵能者的机动部队，将拒生花引离巢穴后加以消灭；二是将其诱入预设阵地后，由行刑者小队实施清剿。还有一个方案，则是组织一支大型献祭队伍，将这些生物诱导至偏远荒芜的地区。”

languages.text: "Der Colonel-Gouverneur schlägt verschiedene Strategien vor. Wir könnten mobile Teams aus Psionikern bilden, um die Kreaturen aus ihren Verstecken zu locken und auszulöschen, oder wir locken die Kreaturen zu festgelegten Positionen und überlassen den Exekutionskommandos den Rest. Wir könnten die Kreaturen aber auch in unbewohnte Regionen führen, nachdem wir eine Expedition in Form einer großen Opferprozession organisiert haben."
languages.original_text: "The Colonel-Governor proposes several possible strategies, either to organise mobile teams with psykers to lure the creatures from their lairs and exterminate them or to draw the creatures to pre-prepared positions for destruction by executioner squads. Finally, the creatures could be led en masse to remote, uninhabited regions, after assembling an expedition in the form of a great sacrificial procession."

traits.locale_text: "Der Colonel-Gouverneur schlägt verschiedene Strategien vor. Wir könnten mobile Teams aus Psionikern bilden, um die Kreaturen aus ihren Verstecken zu locken und auszulöschen, oder wir locken die Kreaturen zu festgelegten Positionen und überlassen den Exekutionskommandos den Rest. Wir könnten die Kreaturen aber auch in unbewohnte Regionen führen, nachdem wir eine Expedition in Form einer großen Opferprozession organisiert haben."

languages.text: "Vali Albay, yaratıkları inlerinden çıkarıp yok etmek için ruhsezerlerden oluşan mobil ekipler kurmayı ya da infaz mangaları tarafından yok edilmeleri için önceden hazırlanmış mevzilere çekmeyi içeren çeşitli olası stratejiler öneriyor. Son olarak, büyük bir kurban töreni şeklinde bir keşif birliği toplanarak yaratıklar toplu hâlde uzak, ıssız bölgelere de çekilebilirler."
languages.original_text: "The Colonel-Governor proposes several possible strategies, either to organise mobile teams with psykers to lure the creatures from their lairs and exterminate them or to draw the creatures to pre-prepared positions for destruction by executioner squads. Finally, the creatures could be led en masse to remote, uninhabited regions, after assembling an expedition in the form of a great sacrificial procession."

traits.locale_text: "Vali Albay, yaratıkları inlerinden çıkarıp yok etmek için ruhsezerlerden oluşan mobil ekipler kurmayı ya da infaz mangaları tarafından yok edilmeleri için önceden hazırlanmış mevzilere çekmeyi içeren çeşitli olası stratejiler öneriyor. Son olarak, büyük bir kurban töreni şeklinde bir keşif birliği toplanarak yaratıklar toplu hâlde uzak, ıssız bölgelere de çekilebilirler."

languages.text: « {nc|La colonelle-gouverneure|Le colonel-gouverneur} envisage plusieurs stratégies viables. L'une consiste à former des escouades mobiles de psykers pour débusquer les créatures de leurs antres et les exterminer. Une autre à appâter les créatures jusqu'à des points stratégiques en vue de leur annihilation par des groupes d'assaut. Enfin, nous pourrions monter une expédition servant de procession sacrificielle, dont l'unique but serait d'attirer les créatures dans des coins reculés et déserts. »
languages.original_text: "The Colonel-Governor proposes several possible strategies, either to organise mobile teams with psykers to lure the creatures from their lairs and exterminate them or to draw the creatures to pre-prepared positions for destruction by executioner squads. Finally, the creatures could be led en masse to remote, uninhabited regions, after assembling an expedition in the form of a great sacrificial procession."
